File: C:\BM
artifact_summary: Process flow, instrumentation, and electrical connections for a sludge feed system involving grinders, pumps, and centrifuges.
artifact_blurb: A detailed Piping and Instrumentation Diagram (P&ID) illustrating the sludge feed subsystem of a wastewater dewatering facility. The schematic maps the hydraulic process flow, control instrumentation, and power distribution for critical equipment including grinders, transfer pumps, and centrifuges used in the treatment sequence.
replacement_text: A detailed Piping and Instrumentation Diagram (P&ID) illustrating the sludge feed subsystem of a wastewater dewatering facility. The schematic maps the hydraulic process flow, control instrumentation, and power distribution for critical equipment including grinders, transfer pumps, and centrifuges used in the treatment sequence.
